run_metadata.window_note: Strict 72h (June 3–6) yielded 5 verified items; expanded to 5 days per skill protocol

items.title: OpenAI ChatGPT Dreaming V3 Replaces Manual Memory with Background Synthesis

key_claims.claim: Factual recall 82.8% on OpenAI internal eval (up from 41.5% in 2024)
5× compute reduction for Free-tier rollout
2× more memory for Plus/Pro users

caveats: All performance metrics are vendor self-reported

items.title: xAI Opens Grok Voice Agent API and Grok Imagine Video 1.5 Preview to Developers
items.note: x.ai/news primary returned HTTP 403; confirmed via docs.x.ai (T2) and multiple T3 outlets

key_claims.claim: Grok Voice Agent API priced at $0.05/minute
Grok Imagine Video 1.5 priced at $0.08/second of output
Voice Agent API #1 on Big Bench Audio
key_claims.status: vendor-claimed, no independent verification this run

caveats: Primary news pages at x.ai returned 403

items.title: Microsoft Scout Always-On Personal Agent Enters Private Preview

key_claims.claim: Requires GitHub Copilot license + Frontier enrollment
Each agent operates with its own Entra identity
Built on OpenClaw open-source technology

caveats: Third-party agent auto-discovery listed as future capability

items.title: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra (550B) Open-Weight Model Goes Live on HuggingFace
items.note: Primary research page not directly fetched; confirmed via Artificial Analysis (T2) and multiple T3 outlets

key_claims.claim: 550B total parameters, 55B active per inference pass (MoE architecture)
300+ tokens/second throughput on pre-release DeepInfra endpoint
Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index score: 48 (US open-weight leader)
Kimi K2.6 leads global open-weight leaderboard at 54 on same index

caveats: Throughput figure is pre-release vendor measurement

items.title: Noma Launches Agentic Access Control for AI Agents and MCP Servers

key_claims.claim: Per-tool policy enforcement at tool, agent, user, team, or environment granularity
Real-time dynamic registry of all agents and MCP servers

items.title: Microsoft Debuts MAI-Code-1-Flash and MAI-Thinking-1 at Build 2026
items.tier_nuance: Competitive benchmark comparisons (SWE-Bench Pro, Surge evaluations) are vendor-designed or vendor-commissioned — downgraded to T4

key_claims.claim: MAI-Code-1-Flash: 5B parameters, rolling out to all GitHub Copilot tiers
MAI-Thinking-1: 35B active parameters, 256k context, commercially licensed training data
SWE-Bench Pro: MAI-Code 51.2% vs. Claude Haiku 4.5 35.2%

caveats: MAI-Thinking-1 private preview only; GA timeline not disclosed
All benchmark comparisons vendor-run or vendor-commissioned

items.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Partner Network Services Track with $100M Investment

key_claims.claim: Preferred tier: 100 certified individuals, 15 deployed joint customers minimum
Global Premier: 1,000 certified individuals, 100 deployed customers across 3+ regions
$100 million investment in partner training and support

items.title: Anthropic Maps a Year of AI-Enabled Cyberattacks to MITRE ATT&CK

key_claims.claim: 832 accounts analyzed (March 2025 – March 2026)
67.3% of accounts used AI for malware development
Medium-risk-or-higher actor proportion rose from 33% to 56% across two 6-month periods

items.title: Trump Signs AI Executive Order Requiring Voluntary 30-Day Pre-Release Model Review

key_claims.claim: Voluntary 30-day pre-release government access to frontier AI models
Earlier draft required mandatory 90-day window; reduced and made voluntary in final order

items.title: Anthropic Files Confidential S-1 with SEC for Proposed IPO

key_claims.claim: Confidential S-1 submitted June 1, 2026
IPO subject to SEC review and market conditions; no price or share count set
$965B post-Series H valuation
key_claims.status: third-party unconfirmed by Anthropic; cited for context only
